description: Style NoteLook daper in these shirts from french connection. Button up and stand to attention in these checked, striped, plain, casual and formal shirts, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Style these shirts with formal pants or jeans and up your style quotient.Product DetailsBlack shirt has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding on the pocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverse sideSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
